relatedness_reasoning: Both files concern unauthorized transaction complaints and fraud detection; risk_and_compliance receives escalations from customer_services and issues transaction holds to accounts. Core fields (customer_id, customer_name, account_number, amount, currency, fraud indicators, severity) align across the pipeline, and the outbound file's structure plausibly derives from processing the inbound escalation.

Outbound department is risk_and_compliance, which is the target_department receiving the inbound escalation.
